name: American Light Lager
description: Light-bodied, highly carbonated, very clean lager.

name: American Pale Ale
description: Moderate-strength pale ale with American hops. Balanced with malt.

name: American IPA
description: Decidedly hoppy and bitter. Showcases American hop varieties.

name: New England IPA
description: Intensely hop-forward, juicy, hazy, soft bitterness.

name: Session IPA
description: Lower-gravity hop-forward pale ale. Drinkable and refreshing.

name: English Bitter
description: Sessionable English bitter. Malt-forward with earthy/floral English hops.

name: Irish Stout
description: Black, dry, roasty stout. Light body despite dark color.

name: Oatmeal Stout
description: Dark, smooth, full-bodied stout with oatmeal silkiness.

name: American Stout
description: Roasty, hoppy, dark. Bolder than English stouts.

name: Robust Porter
description: Substantial malty dark beer with roast, chocolate, and caramel character.

name: English Brown Ale
description: Malty brown ale with caramel, toffee, and nutty character.

name: Milk Stout
description: Dark, sweet, creamy stout with lactose for body and sweetness.
